parameters.content:
Webhook
Entry point. Receives the question via POST.
Test URL = testing mode only.
Production URL = live. 
Auth = none for now

Get Context Snippets
Pinecone searches your docs.
Returns top 5 most relevant chunks.
Searches by MEANING not keywords.
Paste API key here. Assistant name = rag-assistant

JavaScript
Filters chunks below 0.75 confidence.
Labels each chunk with source file.
Builds the prompt.
Handles last 3 conversation turns.
I used Claude to write this — you can too.

Message a Model
Sends prompt to GPT-4O-Mini.
n8n Connect = no API key needed.
$5 free credits on new account.
Simplify output = clean text response.
If it answers something unrelated = update system prompt in JS node
